name: Slidotron_9x16

consumes.minimum: 1 active CompItem selected in the Project panel
consumes.description: Reads app.project.activeItem and requires it to be a CompItem. Uses its name to template the cross-comp expression references. No layer selection is needed.

controls.name: CTRL
controls.role: drives horizontal slide position for Mask L and Mask R via expressions (0 = fully off-screen split, 100 = centered/overlapping)

functions: create 'Sliders 9x16' composition (1080×1920, 60 fps, 2100 s) with dark-gray background
create 'Slide 9x16' composition (1080×1920, 60 fps, 2100 s) as a reusable slide template
add 'Sliders 9x16' layer to the active comp and attach a 'CTRL' Slider Control effect set to 100
add disabled shape layer 'Mask L' (540×1920 rectangle, mirrored via −100% scale) to 'Sliders 9x16'
add disabled shape layer 'Mask R' (540×1920 rectangle) to 'Sliders 9x16'
add two instances of 'Slide 9x16' as alpha track-matte targets of Mask L and Mask R respectively
parent each Slide 9x16 layer to its corresponding mask layer for coordinated movement
write expression on Mask L X-position: maps CTRL slider 0→100 to X position −5→540
write expression on Mask R X-position: maps CTRL slider 0→100 to X position 1085→540

scriptSim.scenario: success — builds 9x16 slider rig from active comp
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Story Comp' (1080×1920, 60 fps) with no layers; no selection required

operations.target: Mask L > ADBE Vector Rect Size
Mask R > ADBE Vector Rect Size

expressions.target: Sliders 9x16 / Mask L / ADBE Transform Group / ADBE Position_0
expressions.expression: d = comp("Story Comp").layer("Sliders 9x16").effect("CTRL")("Slider")iMin = 0;iMax = 100;oMin = -5;oMax = 540;linear(d, iMin, iMax, oMin, oMax)

sim.note: Sweeps the CTRL slider from 0 to 100; X position of Mask L moves from −5 (fully left, panel off-screen) to 540 (center, panel closed)

expressions.target: Sliders 9x16 / Mask R / ADBE Transform Group / ADBE Position_0
expressions.expression: d = comp("Story Comp").layer("Sliders 9x16").effect("CTRL")("Slider")iMin = 0;iMax = 100;oMin = 1085;oMax = 540;linear(d, iMin, iMax, oMin, oMax)

sim.note: Sweeps the CTRL slider from 0 to 100; X position of Mask R moves from 1085 (fully right, panel off-screen) to 540 (center, panel closed)

notes: Script is HEADLESS — no ScriptUI dialog; runs immediately on the active comp.
Both mask layers are disabled (layer.enabled = false) by default; they serve as alpha track mattes, not visible elements.
The cross-comp expression references the active comp by name (templated at script-run time). Renaming the parent comp after running the script will break the expressions.
Output resolution is fixed at 1080×1920 at 60 fps regardless of the source comp settings.
Background color for both created comps is dark gray (RGB 38, 38, 38 ≈ [0.149, 0.149, 0.149]).
The CTRL slider is placed on the 'Sliders 9x16' layer inside the active comp and ranges 0–100; the expressions use linear() to map it to pixel positions.
Mask L uses −100% X scale to mirror the rectangle; Mask R uses default scale.
Content should be placed inside the 'Slide 9x16' composition after the rig is built.
